findings.evidence: `rg -n "Subcomodule\.(coact|.*coact|inst.*Comodule)|instance .*Comodule.*Subcomodule|toComodule|factor" TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule` finds only `Subcomodule.coact_mem`; lines 68-74 show the structure fields are just `toSubmodule` and `isSubcomodule`, and lines 134-137 expose only membership in `submoduleCoactionRange`.
findings.fix: Expose the characteristic factorization API: either make the structure carry a factorized coaction with the commuting equation, or add a `Subcomodule.coact`/`Comodule` instance under the exact hypotheses needed to construct it.
findings.issue: `Subcomodule` stores only `toSubmodule` plus range membership, so users cannot obtain a linear coaction `P →ₗ[R] P ⊗[R] C` or a `Comodule R C P` instance without choosing arbitrary preimages in `LinearMap.range`.

summary: The bundled `Subcomodule` surface still does not expose the coaction factorization needed to use it as an actual comodule subobject for the finite-subcomodule roadmap target.
